Entry.JapaneseText: Good morning.
Good-morning▼
Morning! You up?
Good morning, it's Nene▼
How's it going?
Hey! No dozing off, okay? Hehe.
Hey, hey!
Got an email for you▼
Hey there♪
Hey, hey▼
Sorry for texting so late.
Are you still awake?
Let’s give it our all today, okay?
Nene's here with you again today.
Keep smiling all day, alright?
Talk to you later▼
Let’s just chill this afternoon, okay?
Can I text you again?
Let’s do our best again tomorrow!
Text me later, okay?
I'm gonna take a bath.
Heading to the bath now▼
Good night!
Good night▼
It's such a nice day today!
Just because it's a day off, don't be a sleepyhead, okay?
Even on a break, I won't let you sleep till noon!
Don't you sometimes wake up early even on your days off? I do sometimes.
Did you manage to wake up on time?
Did you get up okay this morning?
If you're late, I won't forgive you, you know?
You can't go outside looking all sleepy, okay?
Spring mornings are tough, but you gotta get up!
I'm sleepy too, but I'll push through and get up.
It was hot yesterday, wasn't it?
I didn't get much sleep last night.
You can't just sleep in all day, ▲主人公＊▲!
If you keep sleeping in light clothes, you'll catch a cold!
It's hard to get out of bed, but I need to get ready or I'll be late!
It's cold, but if you get up right away, I'll give you a compliment, okay?
I wonder if a good morning text from a girlfriend makes you happy? I feel happy when I get one from you, ▲主人公＊▲.
Honestly, I wanted to wake up to your kiss, ▼.
Getting up today was tough. How about you, ▲主人公＊▲?
Sometimes you just can't get up, right? But no snoozing!
I think I should exercise sometimes, but it’s tough, you know?
Is there a lot of homework in your class, ▲主人公＊▲? It’s kinda rough over here.
Hey, there’s a contrail outside the window. Can you see it from there?
I’m good at taking notes, but I don’t do as well on tests. I wonder why.
I was reading a magazine with my friends. It had "10 Devilish Techniques to Seduce Your Boyfriend." Should I try some?
My mouth gets kinda lonely. It’s hard to snack at school, so having some candy is super handy!
There’s a couple in my class who starts getting all lovey-dovey during breaks. Must be nice.
There’s a boy in class with bedhead. You’re okay, right, ▲主人公＊▲?
This season makes me wanna sneak out of class and take a nap on the rooftop. Not that I’d actually do it.
A lot of people seem sleepy today. Is it the same over there?
Ugh, it’s hot. Boys can just casually take off their clothes, huh?
It’s tough... If I were at Dexies, the AC would be on all the time, but not at school.
I really like the route to school. The scenery is lovely and the weather feels nice.
It’s the season for reading. Are you reading anything, ▲主人公＊▲?
It looks like it’ll be cold on the way home. Better hurry back.
If it’s this cold, not many customers will come to Dexies.
When I’m texting you, everyone keeps peeking over. Don’t worry, I won’t show them!
Speaking of which, my friends keep saying I look prettier lately... Is it because of you, ▲主人公＊▲?
By the way, my friends say I’ve become more alluring recently. Is that really true?
The boys in class are talking about which younger girls are cute. Do they like younger girls?
I kinda like morning classes. I get sleepy after lunch.
Ugh, there's a surprise test.
I aced the pop quiz with a 100! ♪
That was close! I almost got caught on my phone by the teacher.
I’m using my new mechanical pencil today! ♪
Hehe, I got a new notebook! ♪
It turned into self-study time. So boring.
If I study properly, after-school will be way more fun.
I just can't focus in class during spring. Is that just an excuse?
I'm so sleepy. Blaming it on spring!
On hot days, let’s not slack off and stay sharp, okay?
Make sure you don’t cool down with sweat!
Maybe it’s fall, but I’m getting hungry. Gonna snack on my hidden treats after class! ♪
The autumn view from the classroom window feels kinda bittersweet.
I really don’t wanna have gym outside on a cold day.
Looks like [22] is trending, so be careful, ▲主人公＊▲!
I wonder how many times a day I think, "What’s ▲主人公＊▲ up to?" Am I overthinking?
Hey, hey, can you compliment me? Why? That's a secret!
How’s your day going?
Everyone here is dozing off. We might get in trouble with the teacher soon.
Next up is gym class. Gonna do my best!
There was something I didn't get in class, but I just left it. I know I should've asked.
Aren't you bored? I'm a little.
I don't get anything in class.
The boys in class are being so loud. You're way more mature than them, ▲主人公＊▲.
If we were in the same class, break time would be so much fun!
Curious about letters between girls?
I just saw you, ▲主人公＊▲. Did you notice?
Go, go! Just kinda cheering you on.
We definitely need air conditioning in the classroom.
Summer can be annoying when you get too close, right? Not for me, though.
Leaves are falling... I wonder if you can see them too.
I bought a horror novel.
The air in the classroom is bad. We need to ventilate.
It's cold again today. Might be fewer customers.
Talking about love with my friends. I spilled a lot about you, ▲主人公＊▲▼.
I wonder how many times a day I think, "What’s ▲主人公＊▲ up to?" Am I overthinking?
Studying fashion with my friends. Being a girl is tough! ♪
None of my friends in class get movie references. That's kinda frustrating.
There's a raccoon at the river. So cute! ▼
I got scolded for having the volume too loud. Ugh.
Eating while watching TV is kinda rude, right? I try to be careful, but...
I'm watching a show, and I'm actually pretty good at this kind of stuff, you know?
What’s a classic dish for 24]? I'm thinking about the menu.
There's a cool movie on late tonight. If you're awake, check it out?
Studying at home on a holiday is just impossible...
I played with a little boy at the park. Are you jealous?
Just because it's 24], don’t sleep in!
It’s getting chilly, but don’t forget to keep the window closed, okay?
Even if you're busy, you gotta eat properly, alright?
Seems like [22] is trending, so be careful, okay?
Let’s both be careful not to catch a cold.
Autumn cravings... ugh, so annoying.
Mmm. ▲主人公＊▲, be careful when you go out, okay?
The city lights for 24] are beautiful. I wanna see them with you.
My friends ask about you a lot, but... I can’t hide it, you know?
I really wanna see you, ▲主人公＊▲... Sorry if I’m being a bother.
I think I’ll just watch TV all day...
Did you have homework on the day?
Let’s put some effort into dinner tonight♪
I gotta do laundry... but if I enjoy it, it’ll be done in no time.
What’s for dinner today...?
I made too much side dish. If we lived next door, I could just bring you some.
Do you have someone you really respect? Hmm, I wonder who that would be for me.
What are you up to? I was thinking of cleaning the balcony.
Hey, is your room messy or what?
It feels great to do a ton of laundry. But rainy days? Ugh.
When it’s [24], I always want flowers in the room.
I messed up cooking. I was so sleepy because of [24]... is that an excuse?
I forgot to change the water in the vase and it went bad... sigh.
With this heat, I’m losing my appetite. But I gotta eat right, so I’ll get creative.
It’d be nice to live in a house with a big garden in the future, right?
Ugh, I definitely overate! Time for a fall diet!
I don’t want you to catch a cold, but if you do, I’ll take care of you▼.
When winter comes, I find myself making hot pot every day. Soy milk, kimchi, oden... so many options!
I decided today’s the day to tackle housework!
Tonight’s dinner is my pride and joy! You’ll be proud to call me your girlfriend, trust me!
Ugh, tonight’s dinner was a flop... sigh.
Today’s the day I’m gonna clean! I’ll make it sparkle~
I’m happy today because I have ▲主人公＊▲ with me♪
Isn't it kinda unfair that I can't see you at night, ▲主人公＊▲?
Ugh, I can't finish my homework!
I'm off to bed now~
I feel like I was just following people all day. But it wasn't so bad, maybe 'cause you were around, ▲主人公＊▲.
Hey, ▲主人公＊▲, don’t stay up too late, okay?
It's so late and I still haven't finished my homework... I'm so sleepy~
I was almost asleep, then I suddenly woke up!
It's getting warm, but don't sleep with the window open, okay?
The blanket feels so nice~
It's that stuffy season, so take care of yourself!
It's hot today... I start sweating so easily.
The sound of bugs kinda makes me sleepy.
Autumn nights... doesn't mean we can stay up late, right?
It's cold, so don’t catch a cold, okay?
Let’s stay warm and go to bed early tonight, okay? I will too.
I loved you all day today, ▲主人公＊▲▼ just saying.
Goodnight kiss. I wish I could give you one in person.
Working hard helps you sleep well, right?
I'm going to sleep now. Bye-bye!
Let’s do our best together tomorrow~
I can't sleep, it's been happening a lot lately.
Homework's tough... How's it going for you in your grade?
I think I'll stay up for a bit longer.
I miss you... really miss you ▼.
Just checking in, no special reason.
Today was fun! Gonna try to make tomorrow just as good.
I tried to go to bed early for once, but I ended up waking up again.
Don't oversleep, okay? ▲主人公＊▲ has to wake me up.
▲主人公＊▲, are you still awake? I'll be waiting in dreamland.
It's hot, but that doesn't mean we can't cuddle, right?
Be careful not to catch a cold by sleeping in too little clothing.
I was watching a movie on TV and lost track of time. Should I go to bed soon...?
I had a late-night snack... ugh, what should I do?
It's been cold every day. Times like this, I really want to see you.
▲主人公＊▲? I'm feeling lonely over here.
I don't mind the night, but I hate not being able to see you.
You know... I really like you ♪.
I can guess what you're thinking... I love you, Nene! How's that?
I worked hard today. Yeah, I feel pretty fulfilled.
It's nice when there aren't many customers. But if it were always like this, it would get boring.
It’s super busy today with lots of customers. The rush at Dixie's can be intense, right? Hope it’s okay.
The manager seems really happy today. I wonder what happened?
The manager looks really grumpy today. Everyone’s trying to keep their distance.
The staff leave fashion magazines in the break room, which is so helpful! It’s a secret to boosting my girl power♪
Cleaning's done! I broke a sweat, but I'm glad I brought a change of clothes♪
There are so many limited desserts at work, I can’t help but think about them even while working. Do guys feel the same?
I tend to take the long way when I go to Dixie's. It’s such a nice season for a walk, don’t you think?
The drink bar runs out super fast, so make sure to keep an eye on it, okay ▲主人公＊▲?
When there's a festival, it gets crazy at the shop, so be prepared, okay?
I almost slipped on some leaves and fell. So embarrassing!
There are a lot of seasonal menu items, so it’s tough. Lots of people make mistakes, so I have to help out.
The limited menu items are tricky to prepare. It gets tough when orders pile up, so be careful.
I have to clean outside today, but it’s probably going to be cold…
Do you like my part-time job uniform?
Got a raise♪ Yay!
It’s kinda nice working at the same place together, right▼?
You look great in your part-time job uniform, ▲主人公＊▲▼.
Looks like there was a mix-up with the shift schedule today, and we have too many staff. The manager was upset, but it might make things easier.
Two staff members called in sick today. It’s gonna be a hectic day, huh?
The manager seems really down. I wonder if they got some bad news from headquarters?
Should we just keep taking it easy like this?
Hey ▲主人公＊▲, you not busy? It's cool to chill, but we can't just waste time, right?
Sometimes I get a little bored. Having candy on hand is super handy, you know?
I totally forgot what I wanted to email you about. I’m sure it wasn’t anything important.
When every day is fun, it makes me sad how fast they fly by.
Today, I got chewed out by the manager for a change.
Today, I got a ton of compliments from customers.
There was something I didn't get in class, but I just left it. I know I should've asked.
On days when I have no work or homework, I feel like I can do anything! But somehow, time just slips away... it's weird.
I kinda overdid it with cleaning the Dicksies. Once I start, I can't help myself!
On days without work, I think, "Ah, this is nice!" But when I'm actually free, I can't relax, and I have trouble sleeping at night. It's not going well.
Aren't you bored? I'm a little.
I saw a documentary about working girls on Revi. I wonder if I’m like that?
Isn't it satisfying when you can fold laundry nicely? Do you get that, ▲主人公＊▲?
The meal I made today is my pride and joy! Ugh, I wish I could've shared it with you, ▲主人公＊▲.
I feel like I was just following people all day. But it wasn't so bad, maybe 'cause you were around, ▲主人公＊▲.
I'm feeling kinda sleepy, but if I sleep now, it’ll be so half-hearted.
Ugh, I can't finish my homework!
Isn't it kinda unfair that I can't see you at night, ▲主人公＊▲?
I don't have much of an appetite... maybe I ate too many snacks.
Are you checking out the movie tonight?
I worked really hard on chores today! Am I awesome?
I wonder what tomorrow will be like.
Good night▼
I'm so sleepy, but this movie I'm watching is too good to sleep!
Are you still awake?
Towano City is on TV!
Hmm! I feel like I’m gonna dream about you tonight, ▲主人公＊▲!
Thanks for today, you did great.
Take it easy and rest up, okay? ▼
Sending this from my cozy bed!
Goodnight! ▼▼▼
Let’s do our best again starting tomorrow, together, right?
I’m off to bed now~♪
Hey, hey.
I’m a bit shocked.
I’m gonna add some bath salts tonight♪
I tend to stay in the bath for a while.
These little mistakes just never go away, do they?
But hey, that’s part of what makes this job rewarding.
The kids are cute, but you’re still my favorite, ▲主人公＊▲▼.
So cute!
I’ll make sure to pay attention in class.
Morning!
Hey, good morning!
What a nice morning it is.
Rise and shine, good morning!
I got a morning call. Good morning!
Make sure to take care of yourself, okay?
Hope today’s fun! ♪
It's definitely a morning vibe♪
Did you eat breakfast yet?
Thinking about going for a little walk♪
Since it’s a day off, gotta plan things out.
That puppy in the game is so cute♪
Nothing beats white rice and miso soup.
You can really feel spring when you walk.
I’m still a bit sleepy. This season makes you want to sleep forever.
Aren’t you sweating? Let’s freshen up with a shower.
Don’t just rely on the AC all the time.
Breakfast is especially tasty this season.
I totally overslept.
Almost fell back asleep, hehe.
When I went outside, my breath was white.
Alright, let’s do our best today!
Let's do our best!
Let’s make today a good one too.
Wow, is it already this late?
Guess I should get to bed soon.
Thanks for the email! 😊
I’m heading to bed too.
Did you have a good day?
Hope you had sweet dreams.
I was totally at my limit with sleep.
Was it a meaningful day off?
Alright, see you tomorrow.
You need to get some sleep too, ▲主人公＊▲!
Don't sleep with your belly out, okay?
Gotta make sure I don’t oversleep.
This time of year, I always struggle with which bedding to use.
I dried it outside, so my bedding smells like sunshine.
Be careful sleeping with the AC on, or you might catch a summer cold.
Wow, how did it get so late?
I can hear the bugs chirping softly.
I hate cold bedding, so I’ll use the dryer.
Ah, the futon's so warm!
Ahh, goodnight~ [32]
So, goodnight! [32]
Nighty night!
Sleep tight!
What’s up?
What?
You’re in class, right? [32]
You shouldn’t be texting in class! [32]
I’m totally focused on my lessons.
I was just a bit sleepy.
I know some people are sneaking in texts, though.
Can't wait until break? You're so spoiled.
It's okay sometimes, but don’t spam me, okay?
I was texting ▲主人公＊▲. Totally surprised!
Are you really listening to what I say?
Looks like today's class might be on the test. Gotta pay attention!
You were dozing off 'cause it was warm, right?
With this weather, a lot of people are zoning out. How about you?
I wish it would just be summer vacation already!
I can't wait! When's our pool class?
This season is perfect for focusing.
Doesn't your brain start to crave snacks?
It's chilly. I think I'll tuck my hands in my sleeves.
Is it not okay to wear my coat during class?
Okay, focus focus!
Keep the texting during class to a minimum.
Sneaking texts is kinda thrilling.
Uh-oh, the teacher's coming this way! Talk later!
I was in the bath.
Sorry for the late reply! I was in the bath.
It's Nene here! [32]
I plan to stay up a bit longer.
Gotta take care of my skin, you know? [32]
Have you taken a bath yet, ▲主人公＊▲?
What have you been up to, ▲主人公＊▲?
I need to wash all the parts properly.
What shampoo do you use, ▲主人公＊▲?
Do you use conditioner or rinse, ▲主人公＊▲?
I kinda got carried away in the bath.
I'm using a bath additive with a fresh leaf scent. So seasonal, right?
I floated some flowers I picked from the garden instead of bath additives. [32]
I tried soaking in really hot water. It felt like a mini sauna! [32]
I made it a bath. It actually made me feel warm all over.
I was in a half bath for about an hour.
Do you read in the bath, ▲主人公＊▲?
I kinda went back to my childhood and submerged in the tub. Is that childish?
I took my bath. Gonna hit the hay early tonight.
Freshly washed pajamas feel so nice. [32]
I wish I could get a massage. Just kidding! [32]
I'll text you later, okay?
I'm in the middle of dinner right now.
I just finished eating.
It was a good meal.
I was busy.
I was having lunch.
It's rude to text while eating, right? I texted after I finished.
Looking at messages while eating makes it hard to focus and probably messes with digestion.
Have you eaten yet, ▲主人公＊▲?
What are you up to, ▲主人公＊▲? Have you eaten yet?
I made today's menu! [32]
Dad made [35] today.
I want to invite ▲主人公＊▲ over for dinner! [32]
Today's main dish was [35]! ♪
There are lots of veggies you can only get here.
I used a ton of spring veggies in the salad! ♪
They say it kills your appetite, but I just eat anyway. I need to diet!
Speaking of which, it's all about somen, right? Have you ever done nagashi somen?
[35] is just so delicious.
Everything's so good, I end up eating too much. Gotta hold back!
It has to be... 🎶 right?
It's the perfect season for them! ♪
We had a bento exchange in class today. My bento got great reviews!
Today wasn't bento, so I had soba at the cafeteria.
What are you eating, ▲主人公＊▲?
By the way, can you cook, ▲主人公＊▲?
What should I have for dessert~♪
I’ll keep pushing through.
Thanks for the meal! ♪
Thanks for the meal! Gotta do the dishes!
Still studying.
I’m studying, you know.
It's tough. I feel lonely doing it alone.
Hmm, maybe I should take a break.
Have you finished your homework yet, ▲主人公＊▲?
I was just thinking of taking a break, so your message came at a perfect time!
I need to study properly, not just for tests. I'm in my third year, after all.
Are you studying too, ▲主人公＊▲?
Even on breaks, studying is important.
I haven't gotten any assignments, but I'm reviewing a class that was a bit confusing.
Is there a subject you need help with? I can give you some private lessons!
Are you studying, ▲主人公＊▲? You can't just play all the time, you know?
I'm a bit tired, so I think I'll go for a walk.
Are you really understanding your classes, ▲主人公＊▲? This is a crucial time!
When you're tired, sweets are the way to go. So I'm having ice cream!
I'm drinking some lemon tea to refresh myself.
I had dinner not long ago, but I'm getting hungry again.
Fall really makes studying so much easier.
If it's too warm, I get sleepy, and if it's cold, my efficiency drops.
Make sure to stay warm while studying, okay? Don't catch a cold like me!
I’m stuck on a tricky problem. Should I check the answer in the reference book...?
Wanna study together? I can help with anything you don’t get.
Thanks for messaging me!
Let’s take a breather and keep pushing through♪
Oops, I forgot my eraser!
It’s noisy outside the room. I wonder what’s going on?
Looks like Mom broke a dish. Gonna help her out for a bit.
I’m doing laundry right now.
Wow, it's already noon.
I got caught stretching by some guys. So embarrassing!
Just taking a nap.
I’m so happy to hear from you!
Wait, is it evening already? Time flies!
Wow, can’t believe it’s already this late.
Oh, got an email. I was cleaning today.
Everyone's just relaxing at home today.
I’m thinking about cutting my hair.
I’m debating whether to redecorate my room.
What was I up to today again?
It’s already gone by so fast. Today flew by!
I was watching a nature show on TV. So many cute animals!
I’m trying out the workout from that diet show on TV. It’s pretty tough!
I was thinking about you, you know.
I've been thinking about new flavors for the dishes.
It's my part-time job day. I'm on break now.
It's a work day. Just got my break.
Phew, taking a breather. I'm working today.
I'm a bit busy, so just a quick message.
Customers just keep coming today.
Looks like the manager is interviewing new part-timers.
There are a lot of families today, and the kids are running around.
Today feels pretty normal.
The kitchen seems a bit hectic with the menu.
The strawberry parfait is super popular today.
I think the AC is acting up; it's a bit warm out here.
There are so many girls' groups today, it's lively!
The mixed rice dish is a hit.
It's kinda embarrassing when my stomach growls while serving customers, hehe.
The water here is really cold!
One of the part-timers is off today, so it's super busy.
I'm in the middle of dinner right now.
I can't check my messages during work.
Hey, ▲主人公＊▲, when's our next date?
Alright, back to work now!
Hey, I might be a bit tired today.
But I can't really say I'm feeling down.
Yeah, I'm good!
I'm feeling fine.
My body's feeling light today.
I wonder if there's something fun to do to change things up?
I think I'll feel better if I just rest, so don't worry about me.
It's just one of those days, you know?
Yep, I'm doing well!
That really helped lift my mood. Thanks!
Got any interesting news?
I need to think of something fun.
I miss you, ▲主人公＊▲.
How about you, ▲主人公＊▲?
Heh, that’s a weird question.
I wonder if ▲主人公＊▲ is doing well?
Feeling super energetic! Is that a bit old-fashioned?
I'm always full of energy.
I'm always energized when I'm with you, ▲主人公＊▲!
Did you use that? Thanks!
Sending this makes me wonder, are you feeling down?
I wanna share your kindness with everyone!
Should I send some of my energy your way?
I'm feeling super great! Hehe.
I really wanna see you!
What's up?
Thanks.
Me too!
Aww, thanks!
I love you too!
Yeah, I like you too.
Thanks, that makes me happy.
Did you think of me?
It's a bit surprising, but in a good way.
I like you too!
Hehe, I actually love getting messages like this.
I love you a lot!
I was just thinking about you too.
I love you!
So, I’ll say it too. I love you!
I can't wait to see you!
Yeah, I definitely love you more, ▲主人公＊▲.
But that's not enough. Say more!
I saved it in my folder.
I know it without saying, but hearing it makes me even happier.
Saying stuff like that makes me wanna see you right away.
Being with you, ▲主人公＊▲, makes me so happy.
...I want proof that's not just words. You know what I mean, right? Hehe.
The more I get to know you, the more I like you.
So,
yeah,
me too.
I wanna see you.
I feel the same way.
Because?
Right away?
Hmm... that might be a bit tough?
When you say that... it kinda makes me uneasy.
Is there time?
Right away? Sure, but... where should we meet?
Do you have something you wanna talk about?
Yeah, I hope our schedules match up.
Are we gonna meet up?
If we can, I wanna see you anytime.
Hehe, is it okay if I get a little needy?
We go to the same school and work together, so we could meet up anytime.
Now that I said that, I'm really feeling it too. When can we meet?
They say time waits for no one. I wanna see you soon!
Technology is amazing, right? We can check in on each other's feelings anytime. But I still wanna talk in person.
I was just thinking about you, ▲主人公＊▲.
You’re feeling all mushy about me too, huh? I feel the same way.
Should we just meet up soon?
I really wanna see you!
I can't hold back any longer.
Oh really?
Okay, I got it.
I see, I see.
Are you okay?
It can't be helped.
Are we not gonna see each other for a while?
Don't tease me.
Make sure to get enough sleep and eat well, okay?
I might do something fun.
I guess it's okay if we can't meet.
You’re busy, right? Should I not ask?
You can’t push yourself too hard, okay?
If you handle each thing carefully, you'll be just fine.
Does that mean our date's on hold?
I think it's good to be busy. You got this!
Maybe I should try to be productive too.
Way to go! You're definitely Nene's boyfriend! [32]
I wanna see you trying your best, ▲主人公＊▲.
Just don’t overdo it, I’m cheering for you.
Just be careful, okay?
I’m really happy you text me even when you’re busy.
Will we not get to see each other much? I’ll miss you.
Is there anything I can help with? Just let me know.
Once things settle down, let’s go on lots of dates! I’ll wait until then!
...But honestly, not seeing you is gonna be tough, so let’s still go out sometimes, okay? [32]
Is that so?
Isn't that okay?
Hehe,
I’m in this with you too! [32]
So, how about it? [32]
In that case... let’s just sleep! Hehe.
Have you done the homework yet?
How about cleaning? Too much hassle?
How about some sports instead?
Sometimes just chilling is nice too.
How about organizing the shelves? It's a good way to pass the time.
How about you try cooking sometimes, ▲主人公＊▲?
But, maybe it's a good time to reflect on yourself... Wow, that sounded kinda deep, huh?♪
Hmm, what fun things can I do alone?
I'm so bored~~[32]
Make sure to text me a lot, okay?[32]
I can totally picture your face[32]
Since we both have time, I wanna go on a date~[32]
When I think of you, ▲主人公＊▲, I just smile. What about you?
Your emails have made me a little less bored, hehe[32]
It's funny how we're so compatible, even with stuff like this[32]
Let's plan a day out somewhere.
Tell me 10 things you like about me[32]
Try saying "I like you" as many times as you can in a second. Just kidding![32]
I'm sending you telepathy, guess what I said[32]
Not really...
I'm kinda jealous.
That was fun!
Sounds like something you'd do[32]
Me too!
I want some too.
You had something to share, right? Tell me about it next time.
I want some of that.
I kinda feel jealous. Is it okay to feel jealous in situations like this?
I’ve got something on my mind that’s bothering me.
I wish you could give me some of your energy.
What’s up? Did you eat something delicious?
I’m thinking of just going to bed early today...
What is it? Did you ace a test or something?
Well... um, today wasn’t that great, I guess?
You look like you’re having fun, so I’m starting to feel better too.
Maybe meat? Or sushi?
I had something good happen too. My boss praised me at work! ♪
I’m starting to feel more cheerful.
Oh, are you bragging? I had something nice happen too!
Hehe, it’s a bit childish, but I like that about you.
Hehe, it’s because I got a message from you!
You’re my boyfriend, after all!
Let’s talk about that on our next date.
I’m feeling that way too right now. What a coincidence!
Hey, what’s up?
Let’s cheer up!
You can do it!
I’ll cheer you up!
Fight on! ▲主人公＊▲!
When you say stuff like that, it kinda brings me down too.
Wanna talk it out?
How about a change of scenery? Let’s go to the river and shout it out!
When you're feeling down, I start to feel that way too.
Think positive!
But I’ve heard that can make you feel worse. Just take it easy!
Heaven helps those who help themselves!
Can I help in any way?
I’ll do my best too!!
They say if you put your mind to it, you can do anything!
I’m cheering for you! Go, go, ▲主人公＊▲!!
Eating something nutritious will boost your spirits. Want me to cook for you?
You’ll feel better after a good meal, right?
If I were nearby, I’d come see you right away.
I might make a plushie of Nene so we can always be together.
Sending you telepathic hugs. ▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼ Did you get them?
We gotta face challenges head-on!
If you start to feel down, I’ll cheer you up, so let’s keep pushing!
I’ve had some rough moments too, but now’s not the time to dwell on that!
If you need a pick-me-up, I’m here for you! Hang in there!
You did great today.
What happened?
Hey, what’s up?
Cheer up, okay?
Leave it to me, Nene!
I hope you feel better soon.
Make sure to rest up, then we can go on a date!
Are you tired? It’s not because of me, right?
Good boy, good boy, pat pat.
Are you taking care of yourself? Don’t overdo it.
Let’s grab an energy drink! Sometimes it’s nice.
If you’re feeling tired, make sure to get some sleep. Want me to sing you a lullaby?
Do you want me to listen to your worries?
What’s been wearing you out? Tell me about it next time.
If you’re just feeling tired, that’s okay. You’ll bounce back quickly.
You’re fine, you’ve got the energy to text me! You’ll be back to normal in no time!
Sometimes you need to push yourself to get stronger. So it’s all good!
That just shows you’ve been working hard!
Think you’ll feel better by the time we meet?
You'll bounce back in no time. You're a guy, after all!
Thanks for the message even though you're feeling down. Let's go on a date when you're better!
I'll make you some stamina-boosting food, okay?
I'll sing you a song. Even elephants fall asleep to it!
I'll give you a massage next time. My dad says I'm really good at it!
I'll cast a recovery spell on you. Pompompokorin! Ponkokorin~~!
